DISCOVERY 612, APPEARANCES: JEFF LEON, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, QUID TOURING LLC. MICHAEL LIEBERMAN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY. HEARING HELD. COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT QUID TOURING, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE RESPONSES AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IN RESPONSE TO DOCUMENT REQUEST NOS. 8, 10, AND 11 IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO NO. 8 TO DOCUMENTS IN PLAINTIFF'S POSSESSION, LIMITED TO THE PERIOD 1998 TO PRESENT. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO NOS. 10 AND 11. AS TO BOTH REQUESTS, THE DOCUMENTS ARE EQUALLY AVAILABLE TO DEFENDANT. AS TO NO. 10, THE DOCUMENTS ARE PRIVILEGED WORK PRODUCT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
